Interface OpenApi30Operation

All Superinterfaces:
Extensible, Node, OpenApi30Extensible, OpenApi30ParametersParent, OpenApi30SecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi30ServersParent, OpenApi3xExtensible, OpenApi3xOperation, OpenApi3xParametersParent, OpenApi3xSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi3xServersParent, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApiOperation, OpenApiParametersParent, OpenApiSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApiServersParent, Operation, SecurityRequirementsParent, ServersParent, Visitable
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30OperationImpl
public interface OpenApi30Operation extends OpenApi3xOperation, OpenApi30Extensible, OpenApi30ServersParent, OpenApi30ParametersParent, OpenApi30SecurityRequirementsParent
